description_long: This is a pair of dark brown Chelsea boots with a matte, slightly textured leather exterior. The boots feature elastic side panels for easy slip-on access and a pull tab at the back for convenience. The soles are thick, black, and rugged, likely made of durable rubber, providing good traction for urban environments. The stitching is visible along the sole edge, indicating a sturdy construction. The boots have a rounded toe and a mid-ankle height, offering both style and protection. There are no visible logos or brand markings on the exterior.
description: A pair of dark brown Chelsea boots with elastic side panels, rugged black soles, and a matte leather finish.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the rounded toe, elastic side panels, and thick black soles.
description_view_1: Angled front view highlighting the smooth vamp, side elastic, and pull tab at the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back seam, pull tabs, and heel structure.
description_view_3: Angled side view emphasizing the side panel, stitching, and overall boot shape.
